subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: There is no appointed length of life for man. Lengthen your life by living according to God's spiritual laws. Then you will live forever.
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
